migration_note: No database schema changes; all web-server, service and workflow changes are idempotent.
highlights: Denies public access to repository internals, runtime data, legacy diagnostics, token utilities and unauthenticated maintenance endpoints.
Disables directory indexes, adds a non-breaking defensive CSP and removes catalog debug state and request-by-request debug logging.
Runs Olist OAuth renewal and detailed catalog synchronization as hardened resident services with atomic environment/cache updates.
Replaces invalid legacy workflows with a non-financial production journey and an atomic static-environment synchronizer.
Keeps the MCP bridge UTF-8 clean on Windows so Codex tools initialize in VS Code.
rollback: Revert version 9.2.103 files and reinstall the previous Apache/systemd definitions; no database rollback is required.
